    "Average response latency < 2s",
    "Accuracy rate of at least 95% for critical system functions"

  "recommended_solution_approach": "A microservices-based architecture with a separate authentication and authorization service, using industry-standard encryption protocols and a robust audit logging mechanism, with a focus on scalability and high availability to meet the latency and accuracy targets.",
